news.title:
Ujjivan SFB's Q4 FY26 disbursements rose 31.4% YoY, deposits up 21.3%.
Gold loans surged 263.4% YoY, showcasing strong growth in the segment.
news.summary:
Ujjivan SFB's Q4 FY26 disbursements rose 31.4% YoY, deposits up 21.3%.
Gold loans surged 263.4% YoY, showcasing strong growth in the segment.

news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ujjivan SFB, cuts target price to Rs 67 from Rs 78 due to weaker earnings outlook.
Middle-East conflict impacts AUM growth, margins, EPS; liability pressure and asset-quality risks flagged.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ujjivan SFB, cuts target price to Rs 67 from Rs 78 due to weaker earnings outlook.
Middle-East conflict impacts AUM growth, margins, EPS; liability pressure and asset-quality risks flagged.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirms Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's (USFBL) credit ratings at 'CARE AA; Stable' for bank facilities, NCDs, and FDs.
USFBL focuses on scaling secured loans, improving asset quality, and CASA ratio, despite profitability pressures from microfinance stress.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirms Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's (USFBL) credit ratings at 'CARE AA; Stable' for bank facilities, NCDs, and FDs.
USFBL focuses on scaling secured loans, improving asset quality, and CASA ratio, despite profitability pressures from microfinance stress.

news.title:
Ujjivan SFB sees growth recovery on track; minimal impact expected from elections or Bihar MFI Ordinance.
Focus on secured lending, including gold loans; Universal Bank license awaited; BUY rating with TP of ₹72.
news.summary:
Ujjivan SFB sees growth recovery on track; minimal impact expected from elections or Bihar MFI Ordinance.
Focus on secured lending, including gold loans; Universal Bank license awaited; BUY rating with TP of ₹72.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank surged 7.3%, hitting Rs 54.92 on 18 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.88% gain, showing robust sector momentum.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank surged 7.3%, hitting Rs 54.92 on 18 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.88% gain, showing robust sector momentum.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank announces an investor/analyst meeting on March 20, 2026, via virtual mode.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; details available on the bank's website.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank announces an investor/analyst meeting on March 20, 2026, via virtual mode.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; details available on the bank's website.

news.title:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.
news.summary:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's stock dropped 3.8%, impacting retail investors (60% ownership) and institutions (36%).
Top 25 shareholders hold 38% of shares; Franklin Resources Inc. is the largest shareholder with 3.6% stake.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's stock dropped 3.8%, impacting retail investors (60% ownership) and institutions (36%).
Top 25 shareholders hold 38% of shares; Franklin Resources Inc. is the largest shareholder with 3.6% stake.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank appoints Mohd Shakil Khan as Head of Collections from Feb 2, 2026.
Khan brings 25 years of risk management experience, including roles at Sitara, Tata Capital, and Capital First.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank appoints Mohd Shakil Khan as Head of Collections from Feb 2, 2026.
Khan brings 25 years of risk management experience, including roles at Sitara, Tata Capital, and Capital First.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects Q4 OpEx to asset ratio at 6.7%.
The bank projects improvement in this ratio for the next financial year.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects Q4 OpEx to asset ratio at 6.7%.
The bank projects improvement in this ratio for the next financial year.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank plans 30-35% unsecured and 65-70% secured loans by FY2030.
The bank aims for an annual 5% progress towards this loan mix target.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank plans 30-35% unsecured and 65-70% secured loans by FY2030.
The bank aims for an annual 5% progress towards this loan mix target.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank maintains FY26 guidance with ROA at 1.2%-1.4% and ROE at 10%-12%.
The bank targets a long-term ROA of 1.8%-2% by FY2030.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank maintains FY26 guidance with ROA at 1.2%-1.4% and ROE at 10%-12%.
The bank targets a long-term ROA of 1.8%-2% by FY2030.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects NIM to remain at Q3 levels.
Potential NIM improvement may arise from rate cuts and portfolio growth.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects NIM to remain at Q3 levels.
Potential NIM improvement may arise from rate cuts and portfolio growth.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects cost of funds to improve, targeting 7% by year-end.
Concall update highlights confidence in achieving the projected cost of funds.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank expects cost of funds to improve, targeting 7% by year-end.
Concall update highlights confidence in achieving the projected cost of funds.

news.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank projects FY26 real GDP growth at 7.3%.
news.summary: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank projects FY26 real GDP growth at 7.3%.

news.title:
Ujjivan SFB's Q3 net profit rose 71% YoY to ₹186 cr, boosting its stock by 7.1%.
NII grew 12.8% to ₹1,001 cr; gross NPA improved to 2.38%, net NPA at 0.57%.
news.summary:
Ujjivan SFB's Q3 net profit rose 71% YoY to ₹186 cr, boosting its stock by 7.1%.
NII grew 12.8% to ₹1,001 cr; gross NPA improved to 2.38%, net NPA at 0.57%.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank surged 7.1% intraday, hitting a 52-week high of Rs.62.1.
The stock rebounded after three declining sessions, outperforming sector and market indices.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank surged 7.1% intraday, hitting a 52-week high of Rs.62.1.
The stock rebounded after three declining sessions, outperforming sector and market indices.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's Q3 FY26 net profit is Rs 18,572 lakh.
Nine-month profit stands at Rs 41,066 lakh; CAR strong at 21.6%.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's Q3 FY26 net profit is Rs 18,572 lakh.
Nine-month profit stands at Rs 41,066 lakh; CAR strong at 21.6%.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's Q3 GNPA fell to 2.4% from 2.5% QoQ.
Q3 NNPA also declined to 0.6% from 0.7% QoQ, showing improvement.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank's Q3 GNPA fell to 2.4% from 2.5% QoQ.
Q3 NNPA also declined to 0.6% from 0.7% QoQ, showing improvement.

news.title:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank announced the resignation of Ashim Sarkar, Business Head-MSME, effective January 14, 2026.
The bank confirmed no material reasons for the resignation and disclosed details per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank announced the resignation of Ashim Sarkar, Business Head-MSME, effective January 14, 2026.
The bank confirmed no material reasons for the resignation and disclosed details per SEBI regulations.
